summary: Comprehensive testing of Inventory, Finance, Creative Services, and Admin features for Konekt B2B platform. All 51 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified all pages load correctly with proper navigation and data.

frontend_ui_tests.dashboard: PASS - Dashboard loads with stats cards
frontend_ui_tests.warehouses_page: PASS - All CRUD operations, stats, search working
frontend_ui_tests.raw_materials_page: PASS - Table, stats, create/edit forms working
frontend_ui_tests.inventory_variants_page: PASS - Table with low stock alerts, search working
frontend_ui_tests.production_queue: PASS - Kanban board with All Tasks toggle
frontend_ui_tests.central_payments: PASS - Table view with Record Payment button
frontend_ui_tests.sidebar_navigation: PASS - All 17 expected nav items visible

features_verified: Raw Materials CRUD with stock adjustments (/api/admin/raw-materials) - WORKING
Creative Services V2 with briefs (/api/creative-services-v2) - WORKING
Production Queue with task visibility (/api/admin/production/queue) - WORKING
Admin sidebar consolidated Inventory section - WORKING

test_data_created.warehouses: TEST_Warehouse created and deactivated during test
test_data_created.raw_materials: TEST_Material created with stock adjustments tested

mocked_apis_list: Resend email service - hook exists but not used

context_for_next_testing_agent: All inventory, finance, and admin features fully tested. Backend APIs working correctly with 100% test pass rate. Frontend pages load correctly with all expected UI elements and navigation. Test data prefixed with TEST_ for easy identification. Warehouse transfers create stock movements automatically. Central payments support multi-invoice allocation.
